name: White Portable Cordless Table Light (Includes LED Light Bulb) - Threshold™
description:
Liven up your home decor with this Portable Cordless Table Light from Threshold™. This table light features an empire shade crafted from cotton-polyester blend fabric and a white polyresin body with ornate detailing for elegant charm. The touch-activated sensor ensures ease of operation, while the 3-way low-medium-high light settings lets you tailor the ambiance to suit any mood. Plus, the non-removable battery is easy to recharge with the included USB charging cable.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
